element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player choice for handling complexity; affects race difficulty and control responsiveness
Time pressure mechanic; failure results in game over; determines starting grid position
Must maintain minimum position or game ends; creates continuous pressure throughout race
Occupies top 20% of screen; spatial awareness mechanic for tracking pursuing AI drivers
Competitive field; requires racing line optimization and collision avoidance

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Second race (unlock at 3rd place or better)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Increased difficulty variant; traction and braking behavior changes
Reward for performance; unlocks faster car with improved handling
1989 F1 championship tracks; varied circuit layouts require adaptive strategy

typical_tension_triggers: Three-lap race structure with persistent position threat
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: High sustained tension with discrete relief points; qualification creates hard time-gate; main race enforces continuous positional pressure without respite

difficulty_curve.early_game: Qualification lap introduces time pressure mechanic; auto transmission option lowers entry difficulty
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Position countdown threat escalates as player races 19 AI opponents; requires sustained racing line optimization
difficulty_curve.late_game: Wet weather unlocked; team progression mechanic provides power scaling but introduces harder circuits; season completion takes ~2 hours

notable_level_patterns.description: 45-second timer on practice lap determines grid position; failure = immediate game over; creates hard skill gate before main race
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Arcade mode and all Genesis tracks

notable_level_patterns.description: Main race enforces minimum position threshold with countdown counter; game ends if player drops below threshold; three laps of sustained pressure
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All playable races (arcade: Monaco GP circuit; Genesis: 1989 F1 championship tracks)

notable_level_patterns.description: Finishing 3rd or better unlocks wet weather variant; team invitations unlock faster cars; password system saves season progress
